## 五、CI/CD

### 5.1 持续集成

#### 5.1.1 CI/CD基础概念

**持续集成（CI）**
- 频繁地将代码集成到主分支
- 每次提交触发自动化构建和测试
- 快速发现集成错误

**持续交付（CD）**
- 自动将代码部署到测试环境
- 准备就绪后可以手动部署到生产
- 确保代码始终可部署

**持续部署**
- 自动将代码部署到生产环境
- 完全自动化部署流程
- 每次通过测试的提交都会自动部署

**CI/CD流程图**
```
代码提交 -> 触发构建 -> 运行测试 -> 代码审查 -> 部署测试环境 -> 部署预发布环境 -> 部署生产环境
```

#### 5.1.2 GitHub Actions配置

**基础工作流配置**
```yaml
# .github/workflows/ci.yml
name: CI Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'
  NPM_CONFIG_CACHE: ${{ github.workspace }}/.npm

jobs:
  lint:
    name: Lint
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run ESLint
        run: npm run lint

      - name: Run Prettier
        run: npm run format:check

  test:
    name: Test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [16, 18, 20]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: npm run test:unit

      - name: Run integration tests
        run: npm run test:integration

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v3
        with:
          files: ./coverage/lcov.info
          flags: unittests

  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build project
        run: npm run build

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: dist
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 7
```

**带MySQL的测试工作流**
```yaml
# .github/workflows/test-with-db.yml
name: Test with Database

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    services:
      mysql:
        image: mysql:8.0
        env:
          MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: root
          MYSQL_DATABASE: test_db
        ports:
          - 3306:3306
        options: >-
          --health-cmd="mysqladmin ping"
          --health-interval=10s
          --health-timeout=5s
          --health-retries=5

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests
        env:
          DATABASE_URL: mysql://root:root@localhost:3306/test_db
        run: npm run test

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v3
```

### 5.2 持续部署

#### 5.2.1 部署到Vercel

```yaml
# .github/workflows/vercel.yml
name: Deploy to Vercel

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Vercel CLI
        run: npm install -g vercel@latest

      - name: Pull Vercel Environment Info
        run: vercel pull --yes --environment=production --token=${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}

      - name: Build Project
        run: vercel build --prod --token=${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}

      - name: Deploy to Vercel
        run: vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod --token=${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}
```

#### 5.2.2 部署到Netlify

```yaml
# .github/workflows/netlify.yml
name: Deploy to Netlify

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build

      - name: Deploy to Netlify
        uses: nwtgck/actions-netlify@v2.0
        with:
          publish-dir: './dist'
          production-branch: main
          github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          deploy-message: "Deploy from GitHub Actions"
          enable-pull-request-comment: false
          enable-commit-comment: true
          overwrites-pull-request-comment: true
        env:
          NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN }}
          NETLIFY_SITE_ID: ${{ secrets.NETLIFY_SITE_ID }}
```

#### 5.2.3 部署到阿里云

```yaml
# .github/workflows/aliyun.yml
name: Deploy to Aliyun

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build

      - name: Setup SSH key
        uses: webfactory/ssh-agent@v0.5.0
        with:
          ssh-private-key: ${{ secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}

      - name: Add server to known hosts
        run: |
          ssh-keyscan -H ${{ secrets.HOST }} >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts

      - name: Deploy to server
        run: |
          rsync -avz --delete \
            -e "ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no" \
            --exclude='.git' \
            --exclude='node_modules' \
            ./dist/ ${{ secrets.USER }}@${{ secrets.HOST }}:/var/www/app/

      - name: Restart PM2
        run: |
          ssh ${{ secrets.USER }}@${{ secrets.HOST }} "
            pm2 restart app ||
            pm2 start /var/www/app/ecosystem.config.js
          "
```

### 5.3 自动化流程

#### 5.3.1 自动版本发布

```yaml
# .github/workflows/release.yml
name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build

      - name: Publish to npm
        run: npm publish
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}

      - name: Create GitHub Release
        uses: actions/create-release@v1
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        with:
          tag_name: ${{ github.ref }}
          release_name: Release ${{ github.ref }}
          draft: false
          prerelease: false
```

#### 5.3.2 自动Changelog生成

```yaml
# .github/workflows/changelog.yml
name: Generate Changelog

on:
  release:
    types: [published]

jobs:
  changelog:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Generate changelog
        uses: metcalfc/changelog-generator@v4
        with:
          myToken: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Commit changelog
        run: |
          git config user.name 'GitHub Action'
          git config user.email 'action@github.com'
          git add CHANGELOG.md
          git commit -m "docs: update changelog"
          git push
```

#### 5.3.3 自动依赖更新

```yaml
# .github/workflows/dependabot.yml
name: Dependabot

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 0 * * 0'  # 每周日检查
  pull_request:

jobs:
  dependabot:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: ${{ github.actor == 'dependabot[bot]' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.head_ref }}
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'

      - name: Update dependencies
        run: |
          npm install
          npm install -g npm-check-updates
          ncu -u

      - name: Create Pull Request
        uses: peter-evans/create-pull-request@v5
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          commit-message: 'chore(deps): update dependencies'
          title: 'chore(deps): update dependencies'
          body: |
            Automatic dependency updates generated by Dependabot.
          branch: dependabot/npm-and-yarn/all
```

---

## 六、构建优化与高级特性

### 6.1 模块化打包深入

现代前端构建工具的核心是将分散的模块打包成可执行的 bundle。深入理解其底层原理对于优化构建性能和解决复杂问题至关重要。

#### 6.1.1 Webpack 底层原理

Webpack 的打包过程可以分为以下几个核心阶段：

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        Webpack 打包流程                          │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                 │
│   ┌──────────┐    ┌──────────┐    ┌──────────┐    ┌─────────┐ │
│   │  入口文件  │───>│  解析依赖  │───>│ 构建依赖图 │───>│ 生成Chunk│ │
│   └──────────┘    └──────────┘    └──────────┘    └─────────┘ │
│        │              │               │               │       │
│        v              v               v               v       │
│   ┌──────────┐    ┌──────────┐    ┌──────────┐    ┌─────────┐ │
│   │  读取源码  │    │  AST解析  │    │  模块连接  │    │ 代码生成 │ │
│   └──────────┘    └──────────┘    └──────────┘    └─────────┘ │
│                                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**1. AST 分析阶段**

Webpack 使用 parser（如 @babel/parser 或 acorn）将源代码转换为抽象语法树（AST）：

```javascript
// 源代码
import { add } from './math';
console.log(add(1, 2));

// AST 结构（简化）
{
  type: 'Program',
  body: [
    {
      type: 'ImportDeclaration',
      specifiers: [
        { type: 'ImportSpecifier', imported: { name: 'add' } }
      ],
      source: { value: './math' }
    },
    {
      type: 'ExpressionStatement',
      expression: {
        type: 'CallExpression',
        callee: { type: 'Identifier', name: 'console.log' }
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

通过 AST，Webpack 可以精确分析：
- import/export 声明（模块依赖）
- require/define 调用（动态依赖）
- 代码作用域（变量分析）

**2. 依赖图构建**

Webpack 从入口开始，递归遍历所有依赖，构建完整的依赖图：

```javascript
// webpack 依赖图构建过程
class DependencyGraph {
  constructor() {
    this.modules = new Map();  // moduleId -> Module
    this.chunks = new Map();    // chunkName -> Chunk
  }

  // 从入口开始构建图
  build(entryPoint) {
    const entryModule = this.createModule(entryPoint);
    this.processModule(entryModule);
  }

  // 递归处理模块及其依赖
  processModule(module) {
    const ast = this.parseSource(module.source);

    // 收集依赖
    const dependencies = this.extractDependencies(ast);

    dependencies.forEach(dep => {
      const depModule = this.resolveModule(dep);
      module.addDependency(depModule);
      this.processModule(depModule);
    });
  }
}
```

**3. 模块连接与代码生成**

Webpack 根据依赖图将模块组合成 chunk，并生成运行时代码：

```javascript
// 生成的 bundle 结构（简化）
(function(modules) {
  // 模块缓存
  const installedModules = {};

  // 加载函数
  function __webpack_require__(moduleId) {
    // 检查缓存
    if (installedModules[moduleId]) {
      return installedModules[moduleId].exports;
    }

    // 创建模块并缓存
    const module = installedModules[moduleId] = {
      i: moduleId,
      l: false,
      exports: {}
    };

    // 执行模块
    modules[moduleId].call(module.exports, module, module.exports, __webpack_require__);
    module.l = true;

    return module.exports;
  }

  // 启动入口模块
  return __webpack_require__(__webpack_require__.s = "./src/index.js");
})({
  "./src/index.js": function(module, exports, __webpack_require__) {
    const { add } = __webpack_require__("./src/math.js");
    console.log(add(1, 2));
  },
  "./src/math.js": function(module, exports) {
    exports.add = function(a, b) { return a + b; };
  }
});
```

#### 6.1.2 Vite ESM 原理

Vite 利用浏览器原生 ES Module 支持，实现极快的开发启动速度。

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        Vite 开发模式                            │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                 │
│   浏览器                    Vite Dev Server                     │
│   ┌──────┐                ┌──────────────┐                      │
│   │ HTML │──请求 /src/main.js──> │ 按需编译    │                      │
│   └──────┘                │ 返回ESM模块  │                      │
│       │                   └──────────────┘                      │
│       │                        │                                 │
│       │<───ES Module──────────┘                                 │
│       │                                                         │
│   ┌──────┐                                                         │
│   │ JS模块 │──请求 /src/util.js ──>                               │
│   └──────┘                      │                                 │
│       │<───ES Module────────────┘                                 │
│                                                                 │
│   特点：按需加载，只编译当前需要的模块                             │
│                                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**核心实现机制：**

```javascript
// 1. 依赖预构建 - 将 node_modules 转为 ESM
// vite/src/node/optimizer/index.ts
async function optimizeDeps(config) {
  const deps = await discoverDependencies(config);

  // 扫描并扁平化依赖
  const flatDeps = flattenDepImports(deps);

  // 打包为单个 ESM 文件
  const bundle = await rollup({
    input: flatDeps,
    output: {
      format: 'esm',
      dir: 'node_modules/.vite'
    }
  });

  return bundle;
}

// 2. 按需编译 - 处理 import
// vite/src/node/plugin/resolvePlugin.ts
export function resolvePlugin() {
  return {
    name: 'vite:resolve',

    async resolveId(id, importer) {
      // 处理绝对路径
      if (id.startsWith('/')) {
        return path.resolve(id);
      }

      // 处理相对路径
      if (id.startsWith('.')) {
        return path.resolve(path.dirname(importer), id);
      }

      // 处理 node_modules
      if (!id.includes('/')) {
        return resolveNodeModule(id, importer);
      }
    }
  };
}

// 3. 浏览器 ESM 加载
// <script type="module" src="/src/main.js"></script>
```

**Vite 与 Webpack 对比：**

| 特性 | Webpack | Vite |
|------|---------|------|
| 开发启动 | 全量打包，速度慢 | 按需加载，极速启动 |
| 热更新 | 重新打包相关模块 | 基于 ESM，无需打包 |
| 生产构建 | Webpack 打包 | Rollup 打包 |
| 依赖处理 | 全部打包 | 预构建为 ESM |

#### 6.1.3 Rollup 打包策略

Rollup 专注于库的打包，采用不同的策略生成更小的 bundle。

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      Rollup 打包策略                            │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                 │
│   ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐        │
│   │  分析 AST   │───>│  展开模块   │───>│  消除死代码 │        │
│   └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘        │
│        │                                        │              │
│        v                                        v              │
│   ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐        │
│   │ 构建依赖图   │    │ Tree Shaking │───>│ 输出 Bundle │        │
│   └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘        │
│                                                                 │
│   输出格式：esm / cjs / umd / iife                              │
│                                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Rollup 配置示例：**

```javascript
// rollup.config.js
export default {
  input: 'src/index.js',
  output: [
    // ESM 格式
    {
      file: 'dist/index.esm.js',
      format: 'esm',
      sourcemap: true
    },
    // CommonJS 格式
    {
      file: 'dist/index.cjs.js',
      format: 'cjs',
      sourcemap: true
    },
    // UMD 格式（兼容浏览器）
    {
      file: 'dist/index.umd.js',
      format: 'umd',
      name: 'MyLibrary',
      sourcemap: true
    }
  ],
  // 外部依赖
  external: ['react', 'react-dom'],
  // 插件
  plugins: [
    resolve(),      // 解析 node_modules
    commonjs(),     // 转换 CommonJS
    babel(),        // 转译
    terser()       // 压缩
  ]
};
```

**Tree Shaking 在 Rollup 中的应用：**

```javascript
// src/util.js
export function used() { return 'used'; }
export function unused() { return 'unused'; }  // 会被消除

// src/index.js
import { used } from './util.js';
console.log(used());

// 打包后（Tree Shaking 后）
function used() { return 'used'; }
console.log(used());
// unused 函数被完全消除
```

### 6.2 Tree Shaking 原理

Tree Shaking 是通过静态分析消除未使用代码的优化技术。

#### 6.2.1 ESM 静态分析

ES Module 的静态结构是 Tree Shaking 的基础：

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                     ESM 静态分析原理                             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                 │
│   静态特性                    动态特性                          │
│   ┌──────────────┐          ┌──────────────┐                 │
│   │ import/export │  vs      │ require()    │                 │
│   │ 编译时确定    │          │ 运行时确定    │                 │
│   └──────────────┘          └──────────────┘                 │
│                                                                 │
│   ┌──────────────┐          ┌──────────────┐                 │
│   │ 明确依赖关系  │          │ 条件导入      │                 │
│   │ 可以在打包前 │          │ 无法静态分析  │                 │
│   │ 完全确定     │          │              │                 │
│   └──────────────┘          └──────────────┘                 │
│                                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**静态分析流程：**

```javascript
// 1. 收集所有导出
// rollup/src/ast/Module.js
class Module {
  getExports() {
    const exports = {};

    this.ast.body.forEach(node => {
      if (node.type === 'ExportNamedDeclaration') {
        node.specifiers.forEach(spec => {
          exports[spec.exported.name] = {
            localName: spec.local.name,
            node: spec
          };
        });
      }
    });

    return exports;
  }
}

// 2. 标记使用的导出
class Analyzer {
  analyzeImport(importNode, module) {
    const { specifiers } = importNode;

    specifiers.forEach(spec => {
      const importName = spec.imported ? spec.imported.name : spec.local.name;
      const exported = module.getExport(importName);

      // 标记为已使用
      this.markAsUsed(exported);

      // 递归追踪
      if (exported.definition) {
        this.analyzeDefinition(exported.definition);
      }
    });
  }
}

// 3. 消除未使用的导出
function eliminateUnused(module) {
  const used = new Set(module.getUsedExports());
  const all = module.getAllExports();

  all.forEach(name => {
    if (!used.has(name)) {
      module.removeExport(name);
    }
  });
}
```

#### 6.2.2 sideEffects 标记

`package.json` 中的 `sideEffects` 字段告诉打包工具哪些文件有副作用：

```json
{
  "name": "my-library",
  "sideEffects": [
    "src/polyfill.js",
    "src/global.css",
    "!**/*.util.js"
  ]
}
```

**sideEffects 的三种配置：**

```javascript
// 1. 数组 - 指定有副作用的文件
{
  "sideEffects": [
    "./src/styles.css",     // 有副作用
    "./src/polyfills.js"    // 有副作用
  ]
}

// 2. false - 所有模块可安全消除
{
  "sideEffects": false
}

// 3. 未定义 - 回退到动态分析
// 保留所有导出，即使未使用
```

**副作用检测示例：**

```javascript
// 有副作用的代码 - 不会被 Tree Shaking 消除
function initGlobal() {
  window.App = {};
  console.log('init');  // 副作用
}
initGlobal();

// 无副作用的代码 - 可以被消除
function add(a, b) { return a + b; }

// 赋值给 exports
export { add };
```

#### 6.2.3 条件导出处理

处理复杂的条件导出场景：

```javascript
// 环境条件导出
// util.js
let util;
if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production') {
  util = { build: () => {} };
} else {
  util = { build: () => {}, debug: () => {} };
}
export default util;

// 动态对象导出
const methods = {
  a() {},
  b() {}
};
export const { a, b } = methods;  // 会被完整保留

// 重新导出
export { a } from './module-a';  // 透明传递
```

### 6.3 代码分割策略

合理的代码分割可以显著提升应用加载性能。

#### 6.3.1 动态导入原理

动态 `import()` 是代码分割的核心：

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      动态导入原理                               │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                 │
│   ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│   │                     静态 import                          │ │
│   │  import { add } from './math';  // 打包时确定            │ │
│   │                                                             │ │
│   │  bundle.js:                                                │ │
│   │  /***/ function(module, exports, require) {               │ │
│   │    exports.add = function(a,b){return a+b;}               │ │
│   │  /***/                                                     │ │
│   └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
│                                                                 │
│   ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│   │                     动态 import                          │ │
│   │  const module = await import('./math');  // 运行时加载   │ │
│   │                                                             │ │
│   │  bundle.js:                                                │ │
│   │  __webpack_require__.e("math.js").then(() => ...)        │ │
│   │                                                             │ │
│   │  math.js (独立 chunk):                                     │ │
│   │  (function(module, exports, require) {                    │ │
│   │    exports.add = function(a,b){return a+b;}              │ │
│   │  /***/)                                                    │ │
│   └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
│                                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**动态导入实现：**

```javascript
// Webpack 动态 import 处理
class ChunkGraph {
  createChunkForImport(node, parentChunk) {
    // 创建新的 chunk
    const chunk = new Chunk({
      name: this.getChunkName(node),
      id: this.generateChunkId()
    });

    // 分析依赖
    const dep = new ImportDependency(node);
    dep.chunk = chunk;

    // 添加到父 chunk 的依赖
    parentChunk.addDependency(dep);

    return chunk;
  }
}

// 生成的运行时代码
__webpack_require__.e = function(chunkId) {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    // 创建 script 标签加载 chunk
    const script = document.createElement('script');
    script.src = chunkId + '.js';
    script.onload = resolve;
    script.onerror = reject;
    document.head.appendChild(script);
  });
};
```

#### 6.3.2 预取与预加载

利用浏览器资源提示提升加载性能：

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      资源加载策略                               │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                 │
│   预加载 (preload)          预取 (prefetch)                     │
│   ┌──────────────────┐     ┌──────────────────┐               │
│   │ 当前导航需要      │     │ 未来导航可能需要  │               │
│   │ 立即加载          │     │ 空闲时加载        │               │
│   │ 高优先级          │     │ 低优先级          │               │
│   └──────────────────┘     └──────────────────┘               │
│                                                                 │
│   示例：                          示例：                        │
│   <link rel="preload"            <link rel="prefetch"         │
│     href="main.js"                href="next-page.js"         │
│     as="script">                  as="script">               │
│                                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**在 Webpack 中配置：**

```javascript
// webpack.config.js
module.exports = {
  output: {
    chunkFilename: '[name].[contenthash].js'
  },
  optimization: {
    splitChunks: {
      chunks: 'all',
      cacheGroups: {
        // 预取第三方库
        vendor: {
          test: /[\\/]node_modules[\\/]/,
          name: 'vendors',
          chunks: 'async',
          priority: 10
        }
      }
    }
  }
};

// 使用 magic comments 配置预取
// 预取
import(/* webpackPrefetch: true */ './next-page');

// 预加载
import(/* webpackPreload: true */ './current-page');
```

#### 6.3.3 路由级分割

基于路由的代码分割是 SPA 应用的标准实践：

```javascript
// React Router + React.lazy
import { lazy, Suspense } from 'react';
import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route } from 'react-router-dom';

const Home = lazy(() => import('./pages/Home'));
const About = lazy(() => import('./pages/About'));
const User = lazy(() => import(/* webpackPrefetch: true */ './pages/User'));

function App() {
  return (
    <BrowserRouter>
      <Suspense fallback={<Loading />}>
        <Routes>
          <Route path="/" element={<Home />} />
          <Route path="/about" element={<About />} />
          <Route path="/user" element={<User />} />
        </Routes>
      </Suspense>
    </BrowserRouter>
  );
}

// Vue Router
const Home = () => import(/* webpackChunkName: "home" */ './views/Home.vue');
const About = () => import(/* webpackChunkName: "about" */ './views/About.vue');

const router = new VueRouter({
  routes: [
    { path: '/', component: Home },
    { path: '/about', component: About }
  ]
});
```

### 6.4 CI/CD 最佳实践

#### 6.4.1 Lint 阶段

在代码提交前进行静态检查：

```yaml
# GitHub Actions - Lint Stage
lint:
  name: Lint
  runs-on: ubuntu-latest
  steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Setup Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: '20'
        cache: 'npm'

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm ci

    # ESLint 检查
    - name: Run ESLint
      run: npm run lint:eslint

    # Prettier 格式检查
    - name: Check Prettier
      run: npm run format:check

    # TypeScript 类型检查
    - name: TypeScript Check
      run: npm run type-check

    # 敏感信息检查
    - name: Secret Scanning
      uses: trufflesecurity/trufflehog@main
```

#### 6.4.2 测试阶段

分层测试策略：

```yaml
# 测试阶段
test:
  name: Test
  runs-on: ubuntu-latest
  strategy:
    matrix:
      # 多版本测试
      node: [16, 18, 20]
      # 多平台测试
      os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest]
  steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Setup Node.js ${{ matrix.node }}
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node }}

    - name: Install
      run: npm ci

    # 单元测试
    - name: Unit Tests
      run: npm run test:unit -- --coverage

    # 集成测试
    - name: Integration Tests
      run: npm run test:integration

    # E2E 测试
    - name: E2E Tests
      uses: cypress-io/github-action@v5
      with:
        start: npm run dev
```

#### 6.4.3 构建优化

优化 CI/CD 构建性能：

```yaml
# 构建优化配置
build:
  name: Build
  runs-on: ubuntu-latest
  steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Setup Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: '20'
        # 启用依赖缓存
        cache: 'npm'

    # 并行安装依赖
    - name: Install Dependencies
      run: npm ci

    # 缓存构建产物
    - name: Cache Build
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          dist/
          .cache/
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-build-

    # 生产构建
    - name: Build
      run: npm run build

    # 产物分析
    - name: Analyze Bundle
      run: npm run analyze
```

**构建缓存策略：**

```javascript
// .npmrc 或 package.json 配置
{
  "name": "my-project",
  "scripts": {
    "build": "webpack --progress",
    "build:cache": "webpack --cache"
  },
  "workspaces": [
    "packages/*"
  ]
}

// webpack.config.js 缓存配置
module.exports = {
  cache: {
    type: 'filesystem',  // 使用文件系统缓存
    buildDependencies: {
      config: [__filename]
    }
  }
};
```

---

## 六、代码示例

### 6.1 构建工具配置示例

#### 6.1.1 Webpack完整配置

```javascript
// webpack.config.js
const path = require('path');
const webpack = require('webpack');
const HtmlWebpackPlugin = require('html-webpack-plugin');
const MiniCssExtractPlugin = require('mini-css-extract-plugin');
const CssMinimizerPlugin = require('css-minimizer-webpack-plugin');
const TerserPlugin = require('terser-webpack-plugin');
const { VueLoaderPlugin } = require('vue-loader');
const { DefinePlugin } = require('webpack');
const { BundleAnalyzerPlugin } = require('webpack-bundle-analyzer');
const CopyWebpackPlugin = require('copy-webpack-plugin');
const EslinPluintWebpackPlugin = require('eslint-webpack-plugin');

module.exports = (env, argv) => {
  const isProduction = argv.mode === 'production';
  const isAnalyze = argv.analyze;

  const config = {
    // 入口文件
    entry: {
      main: './src/main.js',
      // 可以添加多个入口
      // 'analytics': './src/analytics.js',
    },

    // 输出配置
    output: {
      path: path.resolve(__dirname, 'dist'),
      filename: isProduction ? '[name].[contenthash].js' : '[name].js',
      chunkFilename: isProduction ? '[name].[contenthash].chunk.js' : '[name].chunk.js',
      assetModuleFilename: 'assets/[name].[hash][ext]',
      publicPath: '/',
      clean: true,
    },

    // 源码映射
    devtool: isProduction ? 'source-map' : 'eval-cheap-module-source-map',

    // 解析配置
    resolve: {
      extensions: ['.js', '.vue', '.json', '.ts', '.tsx', '.jsx'],
      alias: {
        '@': path.resolve(__dirname, 'src'),
        '~': path.resolve(__dirname, 'src'),
        'components': path.resolve(__dirname, 'src/components'),
        'views': path.resolve(__dirname, 'src/views'),
        'utils': path.resolve(__dirname, 'src/utils'),
        'api': path.resolve(__dirname, 'src/api'),
        'store': path.resolve(__dirname, 'src/store'),
        'assets': path.resolve(__dirname, 'src/assets'),
        'styles': path.resolve(__dirname, 'src/styles'),
      },
      modules: [path.resolve(__dirname, 'src'), 'node_modules'],
    },

    // 模块配置
    module: {
      rules: [
        // Vue文件
        {
          test: /\.vue$/,
          loader: 'vue-loader',
        },

        // JavaScript/TypeScript
        {
          test: /\.(js|ts|jsx|tsx)$/,
          exclude: /node_modules/,
          use: [
            {
              loader: 'babel-loader',
              options: {
                cacheDirectory: true,
                cacheCompression: false,
              },
            },
          ],
        },

        // CSS
        {
          test: /\.css$/,
          use: [
            isProduction ? MiniCssExtractPlugin.loader : 'style-loader',
            'css-loader',
            'postcss-loader',
          ],
        },

        // SCSS
        {
          test: /\.(scss|sass)$/,
          use: [
            isProduction ? MiniCssExtractPlugin.loader : 'style-loader',
            'css-loader',
            'postcss-loader',
            {
              loader: 'sass-loader',
              options: {
                additionalData: `@import "@/styles/variables.scss";`,
              },
            },
          ],
        },

        // Less
        {
          test: /\.less$/,
          use: [
            isProduction ? MiniCssExtractPlugin.loader : 'style-loader',
            'css-loader',
            'postcss-loader',
            {
              loader: 'less-loader',
              options: {
                lessOptions: {
                  additionalData: `@import "@/styles/variables.less";`,
                },
              },
            },
          ],
        },

        // 图片资源
        {
          test: /\.(png|jpe?g|gif|webp)$/i,
          type: 'asset',
          parser: {
            dataUrlCondition: {
              maxSize: 8 * 1024, // 8KB
            },
          },
          generator: {
            filename: 'images/[name].[hash][ext]',
          },
        },

        // SVG
        {
          test: /\.svg$/,
          type: 'asset/resource',
          generator: {
            filename: 'icons/[name].[hash][ext]',
          },
        },

        // 字体
        {
          test: /\.(woff2?|eot|ttf|otf)$/i,
          type: 'asset/resource',
          generator: {
            filename: 'fonts/[name].[hash][ext]',
          },
        },

        // JSON
        {
          test: /\.json$/,
          type: 'json-loader',
        },

        // YAML
        {
          test: /\.(yaml|yml)$/,
          type: 'json',
          use: ['yaml-loader'],
        },
      ],
    },

    // 插件配置
    plugins: [
      // Vue Loader插件
      new VueLoaderPlugin(),

      // 生成HTML
      new HtmlWebpackPlugin({
        template: './public/index.html',
        title: 'My Application',
        inject: true,
        minify: isProduction
          ? {
              removeComments: true,
              collapseWhitespace: true,
              removeAttributeQuotes: true,
              removeRedundantAttributes: true,
              useShortDoctype: true,
              removeEmptyAttributes: true,
              removeStyleLinkTypeAttributes: true,
              keepClosingSlash: true,
              minifyJS: true,
              minifyCSS: true,
              minifyURLs: true,
            }
          : false,
      }),

      // 生产环境CSS提取
      ...(isProduction
        ? [
            new MiniCssExtractPlugin({
              filename: 'css/[name].[contenthash].css',
              chunkFilename: 'css/[name].[contenthash].chunk.css',
            }),
          ]
        : []),

      // 环境变量
      new DefinePlugin({
        'process.env': {
          NODE_ENV: JSON.stringify(isProduction ? 'production' : 'development'),
          VUE_APP_TITLE: JSON.stringify(process.env.VUE_APP_TITLE || 'My App'),
          VUE_APP_API_BASE_URL: JSON.stringify(
            process.env.VUE_APP_API_BASE_URL || '/api'
          ),
        },
      }),

      // 复制静态文件
      new CopyWebpackPlugin({
        patterns: [
          {
            from: 'public',
            to: '',
            globOptions: {
              ignore: ['**/index.html'],
            },
            noErrorOnMissing: true,
          },
        ],
      }),

      // ESLint插件
      new EslinPluintWebpackPlugin({
        extensions: ['js', 'jsx', 'ts', 'tsx', 'vue'],
        failOnError: isProduction,
        failOnWarning: false,
        cache: true,
      }),

      // 打包分析
      ...(isAnalyze
        ? [
            new BundleAnalyzerPlugin({
              analyzerMode: 'static',
              reportFilename: 'bundle-report.html',
              openAnalyzer: false,
            }),
          ]
        : []),

      // 全局变量声明
      new webpack.ProvidePlugin({
        $: 'jquery',
        jQuery: 'jquery',
        'window.jQuery': 'jquery',
      }),
    ],

    // 优化配置
    optimization: {
      minimize: isProduction,
      minimizer: [
        new TerserPlugin({
          terserOptions: {
            parse: {
              ecma: 2020,
            },
            compress: {
              ecma: 5,
              comparisons: false,
              inline: 2,
              drop_console: isProduction,
              drop_debugger: isProduction,
              pure_funcs: isProduction ? ['console.log', 'console.info'] : [],
            },
            mangle: {
              safari10: true,
            },
            output: {
              ecma: 5,
              comments: false,
              ascii_only: true,
            },
          },
          parallel: true,
          extractComments: false,
        }),
        new CssMinimizerPlugin({
          minimizerOptions: {
            preset: [
              'default',
              {
                discardComments: { removeAll: true },
              },
            ],
          },
        }),
      ],
      splitChunks: {
        chunks: 'all',
        maxInitialRequests: 25,
        minSize: 20000,
        cacheGroups: {
          // Vue相关
          vue: {
            test: /[\\/]node_modules[\\/](vue|vue-router|pinia|vuex)[\\/]/,
            name: 'vue-vendor',
            chunks: 'all',
            priority: 20,
          },
          // UI框架
          ui: {
            test: /[\\/]node_modules[\\/](element-plus|ant-design-vue|iview)[\\/]/,
            name: 'ui-vendor',
            chunks: 'all',
            priority: 15,
          },
          // 其他第三方库
          vendors: {
            test: /[\\/]node_modules[\\/]/,
            name: 'vendors',
            chunks: 'all',
            priority: 10,
          },
          // 公共代码
          common: {
            name: 'common',
            minChunks: 2,
            priority: 5,
            reuseExistingChunk: true,
          },
        },
      },
      runtimeChunk: 'single',
      moduleIds: 'deterministic',
    },

    // 开发服务器
    devServer: {
      port: 3000,
      host: '0.0.0.0',
      hot: true,
      open: true,
      compress: true,
      historyApiFallback: true,
      client: {
        overlay: {
          errors: true,
          warnings: false,
        },
      },
      proxy: {
        '/api': {
          target: 'http://localhost:8080',
          changeOrigin: true,
          secure: false,
          pathRewrite: {
            '^/api': '',
          },
        },
        '/ws': {
          target: 'ws://localhost:8080',
          ws: true,
        },
      },
    },

    // 性能配置
    performance: {
      hints: isProduction ? 'warning' : false,
      maxEntrypointSize: 512000,
      maxAssetSize: 512000,
    },

    // 统计信息
    stats: {
      colors: true,
      modules: false,
      children: false,
      chunks: false,
      chunkModules: false,
    },

    // 缓存
    cache: {
      type: 'filesystem',
      buildDependencies: {
        config: [__filename],
      },
    },
  };

  return config;
};
```

#### 6.1.2 Vite完整配置

```javascript
// vite.config.js
import { defineConfig, loadEnv } from 'vite';
import vue from '@vitejs/plugin-vue';
import vueJsx from '@vitejs/plugin-vue-jsx';
import { resolve } from 'path';
import { visualizer } from 'rollup-plugin-visualizer';
import vitePluginImp from 'vite-plugin-imp';
import viteCompression from 'vite-plugin-compression';
import { getPackageSize } from 'vite-plugin-packages-size';

export default defineConfig(({ mode }) => {
  const env = loadEnv(mode, process.cwd());

  const config = {
    // 项目根目录
    root: '.',

    // 基础路径
    base: '/',

    // 公共资源目录
    publicDir: 'public',

    // 缓存目录
    cacheDir: 'node_modules/.vite',

    // 解析配置
    resolve: {
      alias: {
        '@': resolve(__dirname, 'src'),
        '~': resolve(__dirname, 'src'),
        components: resolve(__dirname, 'src/components'),
        views: resolve(__dirname, 'src/views'),
        utils: resolve(__dirname, 'src/utils'),
        api: resolve(__dirname, 'src/api'),
        store: resolve(__dirname, 'src/store'),
        assets: resolve(__dirname, 'src/assets'),
        styles: resolve(__dirname, 'src/styles'),
        types: resolve(__dirname, 'src/types'),
      },
      extensions: ['.mjs', '.js', '.ts', '.jsx', '.tsx', '.json', '.vue'],
    },

    // CSS配置
    css: {
      preprocessorOptions: {
        // SCSS全局变量
        scss: {
          additionalData: `@import "@/styles/variables.scss"; @import "@/styles/mixins.scss";`,
        },
        // Less全局变量
        less: {
          additionalData: `@import "@/styles/variables.less"; @import "@/styles/mixins.less";`,
          javascriptEnabled: true,
        },
      },
      postcss: {
        plugins: [
          // 自动添加前缀
          require('autoprefixer')({
            overrideBrowserslist: ['> 1%', 'last 2 versions', 'not dead'],
          }),
          // px转rem
          require('postcss-pxtorem')({
            rootValue: 75,
            propList: ['*'],
            minPixelValue: 2,
          }),
        ],
      },
    },

    // 模块化配置
    esbuild: {
      drop: mode === 'production' ? ['console', 'debugger'] : [],
      jsxFactory: 'h',
      jsxFragment: 'Fragment',
      jsxInject: `import { h } from 'vue'`,
    },

    // 插件配置
    plugins: [
      // Vue支持
      vue(),
      // JSX支持
      vueJsx(),
      // UI库按需加载
      vitePluginImp({
        libList: [
          {
            libName: 'element-plus',
            style: (name) => `element-plus/theme-chalk/${name}.css`,
          },
        ],
      }),
      // 包体积分析
      getPackageSize(),
      // 打包分析
      visualizer({
        filename: 'dist/stats.html',
        open: false,
        gzip: true,
        brotliSize: true,
      }),
      // Gzip压缩
      mode === 'production' &&
        viteCompression({
          algorithm: 'gzip',
          ext: '.gz',
        }),
      // Brotli压缩
      mode === 'production' &&
        viteCompression({
          algorithm: 'brotliCompress',
          ext: '.br',
        }),
    ].filter(Boolean),

    // 开发服务器配置
    server: {
      port: 3000,
      host: '0.0.0.0',
      open: true,
      cors: true,
      // 热更新配置
      hmr: {
        overlay: true,
        clientPort: 3000,
      },
      // 代理配置
      proxy: {
        '/api': {
          target: env.VITE_API_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:8080',
          changeOrigin: true,
          rewrite: (path) => path.replace(/^\/api/, ''),
        },
        '/ws': {
          target: 'ws://localhost:8080',
          ws: true,
        },
      },
    },

    // 构建配置
    build: {
      // 输出目录
      outDir: 'dist',
      // 静态资源目录
      assetsDir: 'assets',
      // 源码映射
      sourcemap: false,
      // 最小化
      minify: 'terser',
      // chunk大小警告限制
      chunkSizeWarningLimit: 1500,
      // Rollup配置
      rollupOptions: {
        output: {
          // 手动代码分割
          manualChunks: (id) => {
            // Vue核心
            if (id.includes('node_modules/vue') || id.includes('node_modules/@vue')) {
              return 'vue-vendor';
            }
            // Vue生态
            if (id.includes('node_modules/vue-router') || id.includes('node_modules/pinia')) {
              return 'vue-vendor';
            }
            // UI框架
            if (id.includes('node_modules/element-plus') || id.includes('node_modules/ant-design-vue')) {
              return 'ui-vendor';
            }
            // 工具库
            if (id.includes('node_modules/lodash') || id.includes('node_modules/axios')) {
              return 'utils-vendor';
            }
          },
          // 输出文件命名
          chunkFileNames: 'js/[name]-[hash].js',
          entryFileNames: 'js/[name]-[hash].js',
          assetFileNames: '[ext]/[name]-[hash].[ext]',
          // 手动导入
          manualChunks(id) {
            if (id.includes('node_modules')) {
              return 'vendor';
            }
          },
        },
      },
      // Terser配置
      terserOptions: {
        compress: {
          drop_console: true,
          drop_debugger: true,
          pure_funcs: ['console.log', 'console.info', 'console.debug'],
        },
        output: {
          comments: false,
        },
      },
      // CommonJS配置
      commonjsOptions: {
        transformMixedEsModules: true,
        include: [/node_modules/],
      },
      // 目标浏览器
      target: 'es2015',
      // CSS Code Split
      cssCodeSplit: true,
    },

    // 依赖优化
    optimizeDeps: {
      include: [
        'vue',
        'vue-router',
        'pinia',
        'axios',
        'lodash',
        'dayjs',
      ],
      exclude: ['@vue/reactivity'],
    },

    // 预览配置
    preview: {
      port: 4173,
      open: true,
      proxy: {
        '/api': {
          target: 'http://localhost:8080',
          changeOrigin: true,
        },
      },
    },
  };

  return config;
});
```

### 6.2 测试配置示例

#### 6.2.1 Jest完整配置

```javascript
// jest.config.js
module.exports = {
  // 测试环境
  testEnvironment: 'jsdom',

  // 测试文件匹配模式
  testMatch: [
    '**/__tests__/**/*.[jt]s?(x)',
    '**/?(*.)+(spec|test).[jt]s?(x)',
  ],

  // 文件转换配置
  transform: {
    // Vue文件
    '^.+\\.vue$': '@vue/vue3-jest',
    // JavaScript/TypeScript
    '^.+\\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$': [
      'babel-jest',
      {
        configFile: './babel.config.js',
      },
    ],
    // 图片
    '^.+\\.(jpg|jpeg|png|gif|webp)$': 'jest-transform-file',
    // CSS
    '^.+\\.css$': 'jest-css-modules',
    // SCSS
    '^.+\\.(scss|sass)$': 'jest-scss-transform',
  },

  // 模块名称映射
  moduleNameMapper: {
    // 路径别名
    '^@/(.*)$': '<rootDir>/src/$1',
    '^~/(.*)$': '<rootDir>/src/$1',
    // 图片
    '\\.(jpg|jpeg|png|gif|webp|svg)$': '<rootDir>/tests/__mocks__/fileMock.js',
    // 样式
    '\\.(css|less|scss|sass)$': '<rootDir>/tests/__mocks__/styleMock.js',
    // 模块
    '^(\\.{1,2}/.*)\\.js$': '$1',
  },

  // 模块目录
  moduleDirectories: ['node_modules', '<rootDir>'],

  // 设置文件
  setupFilesAfterEnv: [
    '<rootDir>/tests/setupTests.js',
    '<rootDir>/tests/setupVue.js',
  ],

  // 收集覆盖率的文件
  collectCoverage: true,
  collectCoverageFrom: [
    'src/**/*.{js,ts,vue}',
    '!src/**/*.d.ts',
    '!src/main.js',
    '!src/App.vue',
    '!src/router/**',
    '!src/store/**',
    '!**/node_modules/**',
  ],

  // 覆盖率目录
  coverageDirectory: 'coverage',

  // 覆盖率报告
  coverageReporters: ['html', 'text', 'lcov', 'json', 'json-summary'],

  // 覆盖率阈值
  coverageThreshold: {
    global: {
      branches: 80,
      functions: 80,
      lines: 80,
      statements: 80,
    },
    './src/utils/': {
      branches: 90,
      functions: 90,
      lines: 90,
      statements: 90,
    },
  },

  // 测试超时
  testTimeout: 10000,

  // 详细输出
  verbose: true,

  // 自动清理
  clearMocks: true,
  resetMocks: true,
  restoreMocks: true,

  // 哨兵文件
  sentinel: true,

  // 错误信息
  errorOnDeprecated: true,

  // 最大Workers
  maxWorkers: '50%',

  // 列表配置
  listConfig: {
    titleSeparator: ' > ',
    describeSeparator: ' > ',
  },
};
```

```javascript
// tests/setupTests.js
// Jest全局设置

// 控制台警告处理
const originalWarn = console.warn;
console.warn = (...args) => {
  if (
    args[0]?.includes?.('[Vue warn]') ||
    args[0]?.includes?.('deprecated')
  ) {
    return;
  }
  originalWarn.apply(console, args);
};

// 全局mock
global.fetch = jest.fn();

// Mock window
Object.defineProperty(window, 'localStorage', {
  value: {
    getItem: jest.fn(),
    setItem: jest.fn(),
    removeItem: jest.fn(),
    clear: jest.fn(),
  },
});

Object.defineProperty(window, 'sessionStorage', {
  value: {
    getItem: jest.fn(),
    setItem: jest.fn(),
    removeItem: jest.fn(),
    clear: jest.fn(),
  },
});

// Mock scrollTo
Object.defineProperty(window, 'scrollTo', {
  value: jest.fn(),
  writable: true,
});

// Mock matchMedia
Object.defineProperty(window, 'matchMedia', {
  writable: true,
  value: jest.fn().mockImplementation((query) => ({
    matches: false,
    media: query,
    onchange: null,
    addListener: jest.fn(),
    removeListener: jest.fn(),
    addEventListener: jest.fn(),
    removeEventListener: jest.fn(),
    dispatchEvent: jest.fn(),
  })),
});
```

### 6.3 完整CI/CD配置示例

#### 6.3.1 GitHub Actions完整工作流

```yaml
# .github/workflows/main.yml
name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'
  NPM_CONFIG_CACHE: ${{ github.workspace }}/.npm

jobs:
  # 代码质量检查
  lint:
    name: Code Quality
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run ESLint
        run: npm run lint

      - name: Run Prettier check
        run: npm run format:check

      - name: Run TypeScript check
        run: npm run type-check

  # 单元测试和集成测试
  test:
    name: Test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [16, 18, 20]
    services:
      mysql:
        image: mysql:8.0
        env:
          MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: root
          MYSQL_DATABASE: test_db
        ports:
          - 3306:3306
        options: >-
          --health-cmd="mysqladmin ping"
          --health-interval=10s
          --health-timeout=5s
          --health-retries=5
      redis:
        image: redis:7-alpine
        ports:
          - 6379:6379
        options: >-
          --health-cmd="redis-cli ping"
          --health-interval=10s
          --health-timeout=5s
          --health-retries=5

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: npm run test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Run integration tests
        run: |
          npm run test:integration -- --coverage
        env:
          DATABASE_URL: mysql://root:root@localhost:3306/test_db
          REDIS_URL: redis://localhost:6379

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v3
        with:
          files: ./coverage/lcov.info
          flags: unittests

  # 构建
  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: dist
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 30

  # 部署到测试环境
  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop'
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: dist
          path: dist/

      - name: Deploy to staging server
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@master
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USER }}
          password: ${{ secrets.STAGING_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/staging
            rm -rf *
            cp -r ~/dist/* .
            pm2 restart staging

  # 部署到生产环境
  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://example.com
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: dist
          path: dist/

      - name: Deploy to production server
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@master
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_USER }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/production
            rm -rf *
            cp -r ~/dist/* .
            pm2 restart production

      - name: Notify deployment
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "Deployment completed"
```

---

## 八、总结

### 7.1 前端工程化最佳实践

前端工程化是一个持续演进的过程，需要团队根据项目特点和技术栈选择合适的工具和流程。以下是一些关键的最佳实践：

1. **选择合适的工具链**：根据项目规模、团队技术栈和性能要求选择构建工具。大型项目推荐Webpack，中小型项目可以考虑Vite或Rollup。

2. **建立统一的代码规范**：使用ESLint和Prettier确保代码风格一致，结合Git Hooks实现自动化检查。

3. **重视测试**：建立完善的测试体系，包括单元测试、集成测试和端到端测试，确保代码质量。

4. **自动化流程**：使用CI/CD实现代码的自动化构建、测试和部署，减少人工干预，提高效率。

5. **持续优化**：定期分析Bundle大小、页面性能和代码质量，持续改进工程化配置。

### 7.2 工程化配置模板推荐

以下是推荐的工程化配置模板组合：

- **构建工具**：Vite + Rollup（开发/生产）
- **代码检查**：ESLint + Prettier
- **测试框架**：Vitest + Cypress
- **CI/CD**：GitHub Actions
- **包管理**：pnpm

通过合理的工程化配置，可以显著提升开发体验和项目质量，为团队协作和项目维护奠定坚实基础。

---

> 资料整理自 2025 字节跳动、蚂蚁金服、腾讯等大厂工程化面试。
